quality.rationale: 需计算度规导数与联络系数，结合变分原理与欧拉-拉格朗日方程积分求解测地线，逻辑链条完整且可推广至一般共形平坦时空

origin.question: Problem 7.4. For the 2-dimensional metric $\mathrm{ds}^2 = (\mathrm{dx}^2 -\mathrm{dt}^2) / \mathrm{t}^2$ , find all connection coefficients $\Gamma_{\alpha \beta \gamma}$ , and find all timelike geodesic curves.
origin.answer: $\\Gamma_{ttt} = 1/t^3$, $\\Gamma_{xxt} = \\Gamma_{xtx} = -\\Gamma_{txx} = -1/t^3$；测地线曲线为 $(x - x_0)^2 = t^2 + a^2$（渐近于光锥的双曲线）
origin.solution:
Solution 7.4. The nonvanishing derivatives of the metric tensor are $\mathbf{g}_{\mathbf{x}\mathbf{x},t} = -\mathbf{g}_{\mathbf{tt},t} = -2 / t^3$ . Thus the nonvanishing connection coefficients are
$$
$\Gamma_{ttt} = 1 / t^3$, \quad $\Gamma_{xxt} = \Gamma_{xtx} = - \Gamma_{txx} = - 1 / t^3$.
$$
To find the geodesics it is easiest to proceed directly from their definition as curves of extreme length. Let a geodesic be $\mathbf{x}(t)$ . Then (dot represents $d/dt$ )
$$
0 = \delta \int (\mathrm{ds}^2)^{\frac{1}{2}} = \delta \int (1 - \dot{x}^2)^{\frac{1}{2}} \frac{\mathrm{dt}}{t}.
$$
The Euler-Lagrange equation for this extremization is
$$
\frac{\mathrm{d}}{\mathrm{dt}} \left[ \frac{\dot{x}}{t (1 - \dot{x}^2)^{\frac{1}{2}}} \right] = 0.
$$
This is easily solved by letting $\tan h \theta \equiv \dot{x}$ :
$$
\frac{\sin h \theta}{t} = \text{constant},
$$
which integrates to
$$
$(x - x_0)^2 = t^2 + a^2$.
$$
Thus the geodesics are hyperbolas asymptotic to the light cones:
